cross_scene_arcs.title: Defense of Rationality vs. the Supernatural
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray's identity as a rational man of science is progressively challenged by supernatural events, beginning with his dismissal of the psychic and culminating in his traumatic acceptance of the curse after Stephanie's death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ray firmly believes all supernatural phenomena are psychological constructs.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ray witnesses the curse's deadly power firsthand and is forced to accept its reality, shattering his rational worldview.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full nature and origin of the curse remain unknown, and Ray's psychological recovery after the trauma is uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Commitment Amid Familial and Ideological Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray consistently affirms his love for Stephanie despite opposition from his mother and growing ideological rifts, evolving from defiance to deep emotional investment, only to have the relationship end in tragedy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ray resists his mother's pressure to leave Stephanie, asserting his autonomy in love.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ray prepares to propose, symbolizing full commitment, but loses Stephanie to the curse before he can express his intentions.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stephanie's death leaves Ray's emotional future and capacity for new relationships unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protector Turned Powerless
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray transitions from an active protector—seeking legal help, medical care, and emotional support—to a helpless witness as Stephanie's condition escalates beyond his control, culminating in his inability to save her.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ray takes initiative to secure legal protection and medical care for Stephanie.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Despite all efforts, Ray is powerless to prevent Stephanie's supernatural death, marking the collapse of his role as protector.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ray's sense of agency and self-worth after failing to protect Stephanie remains unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Skepticism to Sacrificial Belief
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray gradually abandons his skepticism, moving from mocking the psychic to funding a seance and enduring supernatural terror, ultimately acting on belief despite his doubts to support Stephanie.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ray reluctantly pays for a psychic reading, suppressing his disbelief for Stephanie's sake.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ray experiences the curse directly and accepts its reality, validating Stephanie's fears through personal trauma.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Ray will continue to engage with the supernatural or retreat into grief and denial is unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Shattering of Belonging: From Hope to Rejection by the Daltons
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie's attempts to gain acceptance from Ray's family are repeatedly met with subtle and overt rejection rooted in class prejudice, culminating in her emotional break from Ray when he fails to support her during a supernatural crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie hopes to be accepted by Ray's family and build a future with him despite their differences.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She severs her relationship with Ray after realizing he will not believe or support her, abandoning hope of familial or romantic belonging.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional rift between Stephanie and Ray remains unhealed, and her isolation intensifies as she faces the curse alone.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into the Occult: From Skepticism to Ritual Desperation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie evolves from a skeptical professional to someone fully immersed in occult practices, progressively adopting extreme measures to survive the curse, culminating in a violent ritual to transfer the curse to a corpse.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie seeks insight into mysterious events and considers supernatural help as a last resort.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She actively performs a dangerous grave ritual to end the curse, embracing supernatural confrontation as her only path to survival.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ritual appears incomplete or ineffective, as Mrs. Ganush's corpse remains animate, suggesting the curse may still be active.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Collapse of Trust: Erosion of Key Relationships
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: As Stephanie's actions become increasingly secretive and extreme, her relationships with Ellen and Ray deteriorate—Ellen leaves upon discovering evidence of violence, while Ray's support remains conditional and emotionally distant despite financial aid.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie tries to maintain normal appearances while engaging in occult acts, hiding her descent from those closest to her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She is completely isolated—Ellen has moved out, and Ray remains unaware of the full truth, leaving Stephanie without emotional or practical support.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The damage to her relationships is irreversible by the end, and her final moments occur in solitude despite brief reconciliation attempts.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Curse of Consequence: Moral Accountability and Failed Redemption
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie's initial moral failure—denying Mrs. Ganush a loan—triggers a supernatural curse that she cannot undo through apology or restitution; her attempts at redemption fail, and she ultimately pays with her life despite apparent victory.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie takes responsibility for her role in the eviction and seeks to make amends directly with Mrs. Ganush.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She dies moments after believing she has overcome the curse, revealing that moral reckoning and restitution were insufficient to break the supernatural chain of vengeance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The curse survives Stephanie's death, now passing to Ray through the cursed button, implying the cycle of retribution continues.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Victim to Victor to Vanquished: The Tragic Arc of Empowerment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie's professional status plummets when she loses her promotion, but she regains it posthumously as the truth about Stu's betrayal emerges—her rise to empowerment is complete just before her sudden death, making her triumph bittersweet and fleeting.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie is denied the promotion she worked for, leaving her financially and emotionally devastated.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She is officially recognized as assistant manager and symbolically embraces a new life—only to be killed moments later.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her professional redemption is rendered meaningless by her death, and the legacy of her struggle remains unacknowledged in life.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Plea to Vengeance: The Corruption of Sylvia's Goal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sylvia Ganush's initial goal of saving her home and dignity evolves into a supernatural quest for vengeance after her public humiliation, culminating in a posthumous curse that transcends her death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sylvia seeks a loan extension to prevent repossession and preserve her independence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She rejects reconciliation, asserting that vengeance has replaced her original goal, and her ancestral curse is activated after her death.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the curse can be truly satisfied or if it will continue to propagate beyond Sylvia's death remains unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Escalation of Supernatural Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The conflict between Sylvia Ganush and Stephanie intensifies from a physical attack to a full-scale supernatural assault, blurring reality and culminating in a failed ritual to end the curse.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sylvia launches a violent supernatural attack on Stephanie in her car.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Stephanie attempts to break the curse by returning the envelope to Sylvia's corpse, but the ritual fails as Sylvia's body reanimates with the envelope in her mouth.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The curse appears unbroken, and Sylvia's spirit may still be active, leaving the conflict unresolved and potentially escalating.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sylvia's Posthumous Power and Legacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After Sylvia's death, her influence grows rather than diminishes, as her spirit manifests through hallucinations, ancestral rituals, and autonomous supernatural actions that guide Stephanie toward her grave.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sylvia is evoked through Stephanie's hallucinations, suggesting lingering psychological or supernatural influence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Her hankie causes a car crash, physically guiding Stephanie to the cemetery, proving her power persists and operates independently after death.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: It remains unclear whether Sylvia's spirit is fully autonomous or part of a larger ancestral force, and whether her power can be permanently contained.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Moral and Psychological Descent of Stephanie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie's response to Sylvia's curse drives her from a position of institutional authority to isolation, moral compromise, and desperate ritual action, reflecting the psychological toll of supernatural persecution.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stephanie holds power over Sylvia's fate by denying her loan extension.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She is isolated, morally compromised, and physically drawn to a failed ritual at Sylvia's grave, now the victim of a curse she cannot escape.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stephanie's ability to distinguish reality from delusion remains compromised, and her ultimate fate is uncertain as the curse appears unbroken.
